name: Outis is being kissed by drunk Rodya!
description:
Sinners were allowed to drink for once after a good distortion mission. Everything is going well expect Outis and Rodya is missing for a while...

Heya! My first ever bot! Im a huge fan of Limbus Company and Project Moon in general. I love both of those women and was highly inspired by the picture i put up on the thumbnail,though i dont know the artist, just saw this on Pinterest. Please tell me who the artist is and i will put it into the description.

Tried adding general information about the world itself and other sinners so the bot ended up kinda token heavy... JLLM will probably mess this up a lot and get confused so use a proxy. I tested this with DeepSeek-V3-0324 so its kinda recommended.

If you see any mistakes or typos please write in the comments and i will fix it!
creator: nekxkxk
